home.title: DevKitly
home.subtitle: Developer's Online Toolkit
home.qrDesc: Generate text or Wi-Fi QR codes
home.digestDesc: Calculate MD5/SHA-256 digest of text or files
home.asymmetricDesc: RSA key pair generation, public key encryption and private key decryption

qr.title: QR Code Generator
qr.description: Generate text or Wi-Fi QR codes with one-click copy and download
qr.unknown: An unknown error occurred while generating QR code

uuid.title: UUID Generator
uuid.description: Batch generate v4 random or v5 namespace UUIDs
uuid.name: Name
uuid.unknown: An unknown error occurred while generating UUID

password.title: Password Generator
password.description: Generate secure random passwords with custom length and character types
password.customSymbolsPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default symbol set
password.atLeastOneCategory: At least one character category must be selected
password.lengthRange: Password length must be between 4 and 256

digest.title: Digest Calculator
digest.description: Calculate MD5/SHA-256 digest of text or files
digest.unknown: An unknown error occurred while calculating digest

asymmetric.title: Asymmetric Encryption
asymmetric.description: RSA key pair generation, public key encryption and private key decryption
asymmetric.publicKeyPlaceholder: Enter public key in PEM format
asymmetric.privateKeyPlaceholder: Enter private key in PEM format
asymmetric.decryptFailed: Decryption failed, ciphertext does not match private key
asymmetric.webCryptoUnsupported: Your browser does not support asymmetric encryption

codec.title: Encode/Decode
codec.description: Convert between Base64, Hex, UTF-8, Unicode, and URL formats
codec.sameFormat: Source and target formats cannot be the same
codec.invalidInput: Input text does not match source format
codec.unknown: An unknown error occurred while converting

token.title: Token Generator
token.description: Generate random tokens with custom prefix and length

apiDoc.xApiPasswordDesc: Auth password, required when server PASSWORD env is set

qr.contentDesc: Text content (required when type is text, max 256 characters)
qr.ssidDesc: Wi-Fi network name (required when type is wifi)
qr.passwordDesc: Wi-Fi password (required when type is wifi)
qr.encryptionDesc: Encryption type, "WPA", "WEP", or "nopass" (required when type is wifi)
qr.imageDesc: Image file (multipart/form-data, required when type is image, max 2MB)

uuid.countDesc: Number of UUIDs to generate, range 1-100, default 1

password.customSymbolsDesc: Custom symbol set, leave empty for default

digest.textDesc: Text content to calculate (required when inputType is text)
digest.fileDesc: File to upload (multipart/form-data, required when inputType is file), max 100MB

asymmetric.keySizeDesc: Key size, 2048 or 4096, default 2048 (optional when mode is generate)
asymmetric.publicKeyDesc: Public key in PEM format (required when mode is encrypt)
asymmetric.plaintextDesc: Plaintext to encrypt (required when mode is encrypt)
asymmetric.privateKeyDesc: Private key in PEM format (required when mode is decrypt)
asymmetric.ciphertextDesc: Base64-encoded ciphertext (required when mode is decrypt)

token.countDesc: Number of tokens to generate, range 1-100, default 1
